web.title: Four Seasons Private Residences | Coconut Grove
web.description: A home with panoramic bay views and tailored Four Seasons services. Standing in the front row on Biscayne Bay, with gentle curves and walls of glass.

Standing in the front row on Biscayne Bay, with gentle curves and walls of glass, Four Seasons Private Residences Coconut Grove celebrates the landscape’s rhythm. Its architecture follows coastal silhouettes while its interiors evoke the serenity of nature.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66850bc25b2ed96154849957/66c89d741be1af81d47cfca9_TU1329_VP10B_Exterior_Facade_Night_rev04%20copia.webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66850bc25b2ed96154849957/66852209e48cfb60be5f81da_FS_CG_LOGO_BANYAN.svg)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66850bc25b2ed96154849957/66852209279173ac0b4a5cea_X_Desktop.svg)

[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66850bc25b2ed96154849957/6685220974d81b9fd1b517b7_Arrow_Down.svg)](https://www.2699coconutgrove.com/#)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6696747887e50d37e7f254b6_DSC03697%202.webp)

HOME WITH PANORAMIC VIEWS

Standing in the front row on Biscayne Bay, with gentle curves and floor-to-ceiling glass walls, Four Seasons Residences Coconut Grove flows to the landscape’s rhythm. Subtly integrated yet unmistakably a beacon, its architecture reflects the silhouettes of nature, while interiors celebrate waterfront luxury living along the luminous coastline with unobstructed views.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749c0b6419e4a1bccc3b490_gallery_03-copy.webp)

INTEGRATED LIVING SPACES

Designed by Revuelta Architecture International, Four Seasons Private Residences Coconut Grove comprises 70 waterfront homes of generous proportions with 11-foot ceilings with expansive curved balconies that bring Biscayne Bay into the unparalleled elegance and modern comfort inside.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6698d13ebe50268194d43af7_gallery_03.webp)

MICHELE BÖNAN INTERIORS

Inspired by Coconut Grove’s bohemian spirit and lush landscape, celebrated Florentine designer Michele Bönan blends coastal nonchalance with Italian craftsmanship. Thoughtfully designed spaces with Italian craftsmanship and attention to detail in a splendid setting with refined finishes and a classic style that blends tropical nonchalance with European craftsmanship.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/668e7a7b949ada2b1459f502_DSC03697_.webp)

FOUR SEASONS SERVICE

Exceptional services and amenities round out this coveted destination in Miami luxury living, where meticulous attention is devoted to every facet of life the Four Seasons way. Residents enjoy an exclusive residential lifestyle featuring a dedicated pool deck and a stylish bar lounge designed for ultimate relaxation and socializing.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/66b221e07627a94f9b4e5acb_TU1329_VP13_Exterior_General_cropped_Rev08.webp)

PRIME MIAMI LOCATION

Four Seasons Private Residences Coconut Grove is perched above Miami's most historic and vibrant neighborhood, offering an intimate atmosphere just moments away from the city’s cultural attractions, Michelin-starred fine dining, and beaches. Renowned for its rich history and exuberant landscape, Coconut Grove is characterized by its old banyan trees, lush palm thickets, and rare tropical ferns. These elements create a picturesque setting along its boutique-lined streets, where the natural beauty provides pleasant shadows and a serene ambiance.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/668e7ce9a903e5642404ec13_gallery_08.webp)

SOPHISTICATED WATERFRONT HOME

Each Private Residence at Four Seasons Coconut Grove exudes an atmosphere of airy sophistication, featuring expansive waterfront views of Biscayne Bay. The spacious living rooms open directly to the terrace through floor-to-ceiling glass doors, maximizing natural light and airflow while enhancing the open, airy feel of the home. This seamless indoor-outdoor connection ensures a bright, inviting environment.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749bc6b065c9c44947ebd05_TU1329_VP022_Interior_Kitchen_Rev01_Downlights.webp)

MOLTENI&C CHEF’S KITCHEN

Bespoke Molteni&C kitchen with exquisite finishes by Michele Bönan is thoughtfully designed to combine timeless craftsmanship with modern functionality, featuring high-end materials and sleek finishes. Perfectly tailored to the space, each kitchen offers a harmonious blend of form and function, creating a luxurious environment for cooking and entertaining in style.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749bcc158cbd6b0c1a905d2_TU1329_VP020_Interior_Living_Rev02_Downlights.webp)

EXPANSIVE LIVING AND DINING ROOM

Designed for both relaxation and entertaining, the open-concept living and dining rooms feature floor-to-ceiling windows that offer expansive views of Biscayne Bay and Miami skyline as your backdrop. Natural light pours into the space, creating a seamless connection between indoor luxury and the outdoor landscape.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749bd0e8673b1c0ce361258_TU1329_VP028_Interior_MasterBedroom_Rev05_Downlights.webp)

BEDROOM OVERLOOKING BISCAYNE BAY

The spacious bedroom offers a serene retreat with an abundance of natural light and unobstructed views of Biscayne Bay. A perfect balance of tranquility and sophistication, this bedroom provides the ideal environment for rest and relaxation, making it the ultimate personal sanctuary.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/668e7d1024f448b213e041ba_gallery_09.webp)

BESPOKE BATHROOM

Adorned with Calacatta and Carrara marble and Italian travertine floors, the bathrooms evoke a mood of elegance with expansive views and natural light through floor-to-ceiling glass panels by German maker Schüco.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/668e7cb0d3101f1a796369f4_gallery_06.webp)

REFINED FINISHES

Designed by Michele Bonan, the bathrooms are equipped with Calacatta and Carrara marble, complemented by freestanding tubs gracefully positioned above Italian travertine floors. Every detail has been carefully chosen to convey beauty, comfort and wellbeing, delivered through thoughtfully designed spaces with impeccable craftsmanship and luxurious materials.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/668e7d4eff911af4f0dcc97d_gallery_11.webp)

TROPICAL MODERN LAVISH LOBBY

Inspired by Coconut Grove’s lush landscape, this beautifully designed space showcases soft-hued residential warmth to welcome residents and guests. Created by Michele Bönan, known for his focus on quality, precision, and respect for a location’s character, the lobby features statement walls with reliefs of palm leaves, elegant furniture, and organic materials. Blending traditional European craftsmanship with Coconut Grove’s bohemian charm and Miami’s luxury, the design incorporates tropical modernism, with linens, raffias, and natural stones in soft, light hues.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749c11b9609bd5684cf993d_TU1329_VP07_Interior_Lounge_Rev05.webp)

EXCLUSIVE AMENITIES

Residents have access to an intimate library and an exclusive residents-only bar lounge, offering a perfect space for relaxation and socializing. Whether unwinding with a book or hosting friends, these exclusive spaces and curated amenities are designed for privacy and comfort.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749c14086021ea2398157ec_TU1329-US-Miami-Four%20Seasons%20Coconut%20Grove_VPInteriorXX_Wellness_rev05.webp)

ROMAN BATH THERAPY

The Caesar Experience at the spa is inspired by the ancient tradition of Roman Thermae. This curated contrast bath therapy combines state-of-the-art facilities with timeless practices to enhance physical and mental wellness. Residents can embark on a self-guided journey through five distinct rooms, each with varying temperatures and humidity levels. Progressing from Tepidarium to Laconium revitalizes and invigorates, while reversing the circuit promotes relaxation and calm.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749c408c5b6dfd04bb4b5f0_TU1329_VP01_exterior_generale_rev08_.webp)

SPA AND WELLNESS EXPERIENCES

The Spa and Wellness Center combines modern amenities with a calming environment to maximize your mind-body connection and holistic wellbeing. The indoor pool offers a year-round relaxation for swimming, aquatic exercise, or hydrotherapy to enhance your physical well-being while offering a peaceful retreat from the outside world. The Spa is also equipped with both a men’s and women’s Finnish sauna for a dry-heat-only therapy experience.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749c401edffac1479f5d55c_TU1329_VP02_interior_generale_rev05_.webp)

SPA RELAXATION AREA

The relaxation area provides the perfect space to unwind after a rejuvenating spa treatment. Designed for ultimate comfort, it offers plush seating, soft lighting, and a calming atmosphere to help you fully relax and restore. This quiet area enhances your post-treatment experience, allowing you to extend the feeling of peace and rejuvenation. Ideal for reflection or quiet relaxation, it’s the perfect complement to any wellness routine.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6686c3d4612ef06790bd4ff0/6749c47fcf0d221a2b733aa2_TU1329-e_VPInteriorXX_Gym%20Cromo_rev08_.webp)

FITNESS AND YOGA

Achieve physical and mental well-being through movement in the Fitness Center, featuring a state-of-the-art gym and serene Yoga Studio. Whether for strength training, yoga, or personalized fitness routines, these spaces offer the perfect environment for every fitness goal. Residents can work with personal trainers to enhance their experience. For added convenience, the concierge can provide a list of highly recommended local trainers and fitness instructors available for booking. Elevate your fitness journey in this modern, fully-equipped wellness facility.

web.description: Four Seasons Private Residences Coconut Grove offers 20 stories and only 70 luxurious residences, ranging from two to four bedrooms.

# Four Seasons Private Residences Coconut Grove

### **Coconut Grove / 2028**

20 Stories / 70 Residences of
2, 3 & 4 Bedrooms

**2699 S Bayshore Dr, Miami, FL 33133, USA**

Four Seasons Private Residences Coconut Grove offers 20 stories and only 70 luxurious residences, ranging from two to four bedrooms. The design by architect Luis Revuelta resulted in an elegant and contemporary tower. All residences and common areas feature tranquil ambiance, luxury and the latest innovations at hand. Amenities include a pool deck, luxury spa, fitness center, concierge and much more. Four Seasons' convenient location offers supreme views spanning from Peacock Park across Biscayne Bay to Key Biscayne and beyond. With its proximity to Brickell, Downtown, excellent schools, the airport, and its scenic waterfront location, Coconut Grove is a sought-after destination.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $5,600,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/fourseasonscoconutgrove/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

Developed by CMC Group & Fort Partners

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $5,600,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/fourseasonscoconutgrove/#contactform) for more information.

**Price Range**

2 Bedrooms from $5,600,000

3 Bedrooms from $8,100,000

4 Bedrooms+Den from $12,100,000

**Payment Plan**

20% at Contract

10% at Groundbreaking

10% at Top Off

60% at Closing (Q4 2028)



## Features

### Building Features

- Concierge, Doorman & Bellman
- 24/7 Security
- 24/7 Valet Parking
- The Surf Club Private Membership with initiation fee and first-year dues waived (Subject to approval)
- Signature Restaurant on the first level offering in-residence dining
- Serviced pool deck
- State-of-the-art gym and yoga room
- Spa with treatment rooms, jacuzzi, finnish saunas, and cold plunges
- Beauty atelier
- Private lounge and bar area
- Kids' area
- Party room
- Bicycle storage
- À-la-carte services: in-residence dining, in-residence spa services, housekeeping and laundry, grocery provisioning, maintenance and repair, butler services, wellness programs and personal trainers, catering, dog grooming, car wash

### Residence Features

- All residences are waterfront
- Two- to Four-Bedroom residences ranging from 2,025 to 3,975 square feet
- Private elevator access with dedicated foyer
- Continuous drywall ceilings throughout are 10.6' or higher depending on unit
- Expansive terraces with glass railings and 11.10' ceilings or higher
- Lutron Lighting controls and Creston home automation
- Italian travertine flooring throughout
- Molteni kitchen designed by Michele Bönan
- Italian marble bathrooms
- Top-of-the-line European appliances, faucets and fixtures
- Two penthouses and two upper penthouses available

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/03-Four-Seasons-Coconut-Grove-Lounge.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Developer-Four-Seasons-Coconut-Grove.jpg)

CMC Group, with over four decades of expertise, has been pivotal in reshaping Miami's skyline. Founded by Ugo Colombo in 1986, the company is renowned for its innovative approach to luxury living, redefining Miami's real estate landscape through elegant condominium developments.

Fort Partners, a Miami-based real estate and hospitality development firm led by entrepreneur Nadim Ashi, emphasizes enduring elegance, sophisticated design, and exceptional service. With a commitment to historic preservation, innovation, sustainability, and collaboration, Fort Partners delivers spaces that enhance well-being and lifestyle. Through strategic partnerships, they offer top-tier quality and acclaimed international design expertise to meet the demands of a global market.

## Latest News

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/130-MR.jpg)

### Four Seasons Coconut Grove is now under construction!

The future ultra-luxury residential tower, featuring the 5-star services of Four Seasons, has had its groundbreaking ceremony and will be completed in 2028. Developed by one of Miami's most prestigious developers, Ugo Colombo. Excellent opportunities are still available for sale.

Updated on: 11/10/2025
